title: Verify T16: Issue stays open after PR
description: Test that issue remains OPEN after PR creation. After PR is created for this issue, verify: (1) issue state is OPEN, (2) PR body contains `Closes #N`. Issue closes only on PR merge via the `Closes #N` keyword in PR body.
existing_patterns: .kody/watch/agents/test-suite/agent.md:827 - T16 test definition in test suite table
.kody/watch/agents/test-suite/agent.md:906-916 - T16 verification steps (PR body check + issue state check)
.github/workflows/kody.yml:352-383 - Close linked issue step after PR merge
